review_title: Streamlines and coordinates all HR processes
description: What I appreciated best, though, was the addition of the ability to divide data into several branches and sub-branches, a capability that had previously been lacking. In general, the hrone is incredibly quick and efficient in its operations. This program is fantastic, by the way.
author: Alan B.
pros: The entire personnel database is easily manageable. All correspondence can be generated mechanically by the system. Processing timesheets and attendance is a breeze.
cons: It occasionally causes login problems for new users and can affect access to pages and data. Our company's organizational chart simply displays employee names, not their contact information such as phone numbers.

description: This is a good software they provide ontime update, Easy to use.
author: URAJ M.
pros: HROne has all the basic & advanced feature that requies for managing the employ details such as Attendance, In-Out time, Payslip, Reporting managers etc..
cons: Sometimes I have faced some bugs(Rarely)

description: It is a decent platform but not easy to use and did not meet expectations.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The dashboard looks concise with the calendar, the previous day's timing, etc in one window.
cons: The UI is kind of complex to use. It took me a lot of time to find features and navigate through them. Applying managing leaves are not easy. Once a leave is applied, modifying or cancelling them is not possible.

description: Our overall experience with HROne has been delightful. From quick and easy implementation to 24X7 client support, team HROne is the best. Our HR, Admin, and Finance Teams seem to be the most positively affected ones since we started using HROne. Time-saving and resource management still come second, the all-in-one HCM suite can be customized and personalized with steady modifications, this configurability thing we kind of liked.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's a one stop solution indeed. The automation of all systemic HR functions, improvement in employee productivity & performance, and bringing happiness to the faces of users... One feature of HROne that we liked the most and proved to be of importance ‘Inbox For HR’. Allowing all HR functions to be performed in real time from a single window without the need to juggle different modules for performing and completing 20+ tasks makes a huge difference. Apart from the 10 full-fledged HR operations that are 100% mechanized, HROne offers google-like searches that are semantic, predictive, and action-based. The HROne Inbox mobile app enables users to chat, raise different types of requests, mark attendance, read new announcements, create goals, and review performance hassle free!
cons: After gathering requirements and analyzing this HR software, we found ATS (Applicant Tracking System) absent from the recruitment module of HROne. But, we could still conduct the hiring and pre-boarding processes quite efficiently.

description: My overall experience with HROne has been exceptional.
author: Venkat J.
pros: By using HROne's self-service feature, we can view attendance records, download payslips, and track working hours easily with our own credentials. Now we don't have to depend on the HR Team for everything. It facilitates us accurate and efficient attendance tracking. It helped us to digitalize HR processes and reduce paperwork. It provides us transparency on salary calculations, tax deductions, benefits, etc.
cons: Currently, I have not experienced any issues with HROne.

description: My overall experience with HROne has been great.
author: Dayanand G.
pros: It provides you a self-service portal where you can download your salary slips, check your leave balance, etc. You can access it from any computer via a web browser so you don't have to depend on a particular computer. You can even access it from the mobile. It facilitates you biometric-based attendance system which provides real-time access to attendance data and ensures attendance accuracy.
cons: We have not faced any difficulties with HROne so far.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The attendance management facility to mark regular attendance and follow up with attendance regularization if missed by chance .You can look yearly holidays that take place.
cons: The HROne mobile app works slow when opened ,it takes a lot of loading time.

description: I used daily for my organization and i feel it is fulfilling my all needs.
author: Abhijeet K.
pros: Time management for a organisation with their employees, rating of employees,
cons: Reminder for approval is make this more effective.

review_title: A Human Resource Management software with delayed server and connectivity .
description: Attendance performance and badging of the employees and team spirit upliftment and birthdays and work anniversary.
author: k Manish G.
pros: The badging feature and team spirit upliftment and employee dashboard with employee status and connectivity .
cons: The network errors and attendance mis calculation and no server most of the time .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: COnfiguration and Administration not available , flexible
description: OK meets basic needs
author: Mohan C.
pros: Has all the modules and has basic options but no flexibility
cons: Onboarding and initial COnfiguration not available to user as Admin. Its done as part of implementation. The user Admin should be able to configure and onboard. There is no option to Delete a Employee , we could have hired but the individual may not have joined. No option to handle this. All reports have multiple filter to select each time. Report should have one page to apply all filters. Applied filters dont clear out by after logging off. The user access and related field visibility is not linked. You not have access but you will see the option and will get a message no records. If no access given they option should be greyed out or non visible. User Access management is very cumbersome and not user friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Yamini U.
pros: Functionality, we have opted it and found some good functions/modules. We started automating our system.
cons: Their support, its very pathetic that their support team is least bothered about any clients. Also the way they respond is very unprofessional.

description: Our overall experience with HRone is great as it really helped us to streamline and automate our HR processes.
author: Yashwant M.
pros: It helps you to streamline your HR processes. It helps you to automate traditional manual processes like attendance tracking, leave management etc. and eliminate paperwork. It helps you to reduce the risk of non-compliances and associated penalties. It enables your employees self service so they can download salary slips, updates leaves etc. by using their own login credentials in HRone.
cons: We never encountered any issue with HRone so far.

review_title: HRM solution that fits your organization's needs
description: - In addition to providing a central location for storing employee data, automating HR processes, improving communication and compliance, and providing reporting and analytics, HROne can benefit organizations in many ways.
author: Krunal B.
pros: 1) For your enterprise, this application offers a complete solution for managing attendance and payroll.2) Employees can download their payslips and apply for leave.3) This application can be integrated with any type of biometric attendance machine.4) In addition to providing cloud-based solutions, it can also be accessed from any location.
cons: - Reflecting on attendance that has already been approved by the direct senior can sometimes take more time.

review_title: One of the best HRM solution for your organization
description: We are completely satisfied with HRONE as it helped us to fulfill HRM solution requirement of our organization. We are now able to keep track of multi location employees attendance, manage payroll, leaves, advances etc.
author: Vinayak K.
pros: 1) it can be integrated with any biometric machine. 2) As it's a cloud based solution, it can be access from any location, 24x7. 3) employees can download payslip directly from portals. Which helps to reduce load on HR personnel. 4) it comes with everything required for HRM for your organization i.e. time attendance to payroll management. 5) Easy to calculate TDS based on employees declaration.
cons: I don't have any point to dislike HR-ONE because it helped us to fulfill HRM requirement for our organization. But it will be better if they provide 2 step verification for employee access.

review_title: Best software to get track of employee daily activity & profile.
author: Rajan P.
pros: There are various features that are best compared to other software like the attendance system, Leave management system, the applied approach of manual time, calendar, and salary slip checking system.
cons: There are one funnctionality which is not working properly & that is the location of the user is not getting properly & apart from that the if user check-in 3 times it will count third check-in as checkout punch.

review_title: Best tool to manage attendance in real time
description: I used this software since last year earlier we have upgraded the version firstly we use HRONE and now we have upgraded to HRONE CLOUD to manage all things through this software like any paper generation also through this software.
author: Rajesh R.
pros: I used this software as a role of user and I can easily manage attendance. and even I can easily do regularization. This software also supports leave management. as well as this software also supports the helpdesk in that the entire organization can raise their issue and one single person can reply to the same.
cons: What I really facing the issue is in our office we have a punching system and sometimes this software takes time to reflect our punching punchout timing so we have to remember that okay I'll come at this time.

review_title: The application is incredibly user-friendly and trouble-free. Since I've started using this HRMS app
description: Real-time time office and payroll dip,Good performance management,Database administration,Time is saved if management requests any reports.
author: Madhusudan S.
pros: 1. Overview and Reporting 2. Tracking of time and attendance, management of absences and leaves. 3. Payroll System 4. Mobility 5. Asset, User, and Role Management 6. Automated resume parsing, candidate-facing statuses, and hiring process tracking.
cons: Additional funds for customised reports and additional modules

author: sachi R.
pros: The best part is its very easy to understand and all record are kept in synchronise manner.can get any data anytime.
cons: everything is well arranged just some UI need to improve.

review_title: Its very good Product for any organization
author: Santosh K.
pros: We are managing our staff attendance though online apps
cons: We are not able to see our team in apps.

review_title: HROne is a human resources management tool that aids businesses in controlling their HR procedures.
description: In general, HROne is a powerful HR management tool that can help businesses of all sizes. It is a good option for companies wishing to simplify their HR procedures due to its user-friendly interface, customisable features, and cloud-based accessibility.
author: Sanket T.
pros: HROne's user-friendly design, which enables users to simply use the software and carry out their responsibilities without any difficulty, is one of its benefits. Additionally, it offers features that can be modified to match the particular requirements of a company.
cons: Learning Curve: Although the user interface is typically welcoming, some users could still find it difficult to get used to and find their way around the software at first. This can result in a slower rate of acceptance and possible lost productivity throughout the onboarding process.Customer support: As was already noted, some consumers feel that HROne's customer service could be better. For businesses that need rapid and dependable support when dealing with software problems, this may be a problem.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Processing salary and tracking attendance has become easier
author: Manisha M.
pros: Saves time, can be viewed easily. Processing salary has became easier.Employees receive their payslip and letters online.They can view official documents in the app
cons: some features related to TDS calculation and generation of miscellaneous letters

description: The journey has been good so far, i am well versed with the system
author: Eti S.
pros: Updates are available there and the software is interactive very much.
cons: Add more layer in moodbot, there should be reports of all the details of the employee

review_title: User friendly and interactive HCM suite
description: Helpful and good experience
author: Parul B.
pros: Makes HR Functions error-free and better employee engagement.
cons: More colors to every leave and in UI. Also, add company logo beside company name.

description: Overall experience is good.
author: Bhavika J.
pros: HRone is handy to use, the features like Helpdesk ticket, Payroll management , reports , insights etc are easy to use and the information is also provided instantly. It eases the work of a HR.
cons: Sometimes it hard to use because of too many features, things get complicated because of this.

description: Need to make it more user friendly and UI to be more attractive
author: Sandeep D.
pros: It's good for Database Management. It covers most of the features for a mid sized organization.
cons: Password reset and attendance processing
